issue_body_preview:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
When open pages with nsfw contents, the images are visible initially and then filtered out.
## Expected Behavior
<!--- If you're describing a bug, tell us what should happen -->
<!--- If you're suggesting a change/improvement, t
test_description_zh: 打开一个包含 NSFW 内容图片的网页，观察页面加载过程中图片的显示状态，注意图片在过滤器生效前是否会短暂可见。
expected_result_zh: 页面加载时，NSFW 图片应在显示之前就被过滤/隐藏，用户不应在页面加载过程中短暂看到不当图片内容。过滤应在图片渲染之前或同时生效，无明显延迟闪现。
